stream_payload_bytes_excluding_chunk_hea.note: Chunk headers from WriteHeader('SUPM'/'GAUS'/'VALE') are not counted here.

conclusion: For the offline Unity-flags 128-vertex hull, BigConvexData is required because 128 > gaussMapLimit=32. VALE reconstructs to 128 vertices, 384 adjacent-vertex entries, and valency 3 for every vertex. GAUS uses density/subdiv=16, nbSamples=1536, and 3072 sample bytes; the reconstructed samples pass brute-force support validation for all generated cube-map directions. Byte-level parity with Unity still requires the formal-stone CVXM/SUPM/GAUS/VALE stream, but the offline algorithmic contents are no longer opaque.
